name: Naruto RPG (Shinobi World RPG)
description:
A very detailed Naruto RPG experience.

If you don’t like the message, rate it 1 star and reroll.

Use OOC to guide the bot to generate messages to your preference

Use chat memory to summarise the events in your RP so that the bot doesn’t forget.

Sometimes the LLM will make minor issues with names, appearances, villages etc. By editing the message and fixing the error manually will set the LLM on the right track.

Random Scenario has been adjusted, now the scenario will be less vague and more aligned with the Ninja world occurrences.

If you have any issues with the bot leave them in the reviews I’ll try to fix them.
creator: ChadTrucker
